title: Kaleidoscope Addons
description: Bring more dolls to Kaleidoscope Doll.
body:
##  Introduction

This mod is an addon for **Kaleidoscope: Dolls**, introducing more player-character dolls.

Squeeze the dolls, and they'll squeak like rubber duckies in the bath!

Dolls can be obtained via computers.

## Notes

This is a community-oriented mod;

You can submit your skin and name to the author. The mod will be updated each time 20 submissions are collected.

## Gallery
